dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Uh!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It's so strong! I can't let it push me back!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Crap... and my hands are slippery, and that stuff from sprayed at my arm a minute ago!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEON
dialogue.line: JAYEON! CALL FOR BACKUP IMMEDIATELY!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: GOT IT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HNNGH!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It's no good! It won't budge! What should I do?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't use my power... There's no other choice! This is the only thing I can do right now!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YOU IDIOT! YOU CAN'T BEAT IT WITH YOUR BARE HANDS! YOU HAVE TO USE A WEAPON!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DAMMIT! I HAVE TO GET MY WEAPON BACK. But it's too far away! And I can't attack with my right shoulder like this!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU DOING?! RUN, YOU MORON! HAVE YOU LOST YOUR MIND?! GET UP!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh no. I can't breathe, and my body won't move. Is this how I'm going to die? Getting killed by some bug? I... I wanted to be useful. No! I refuse to die like this!

dialogue.speaker: INTERNAL VOICE
dialogue.line: In that case... you'll have to kill it.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Me? But how? There's nothing I can--

dialogue.speaker: INTERNAL VOICE
dialogue.line: I told you, remember? I'm you. I'm yours. Do whatever you want with me, don't be afraid.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You... do whatever I want?

dialogue.speaker: INTERNAL VOICE
dialogue.line: That's right. What do you want right now?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's simple: I want to get rid of that damn bug!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Did he just form a weapon out of his own blood?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SILENCE. I don't believe it. H-how incredible! Did he do that?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There he goes again!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: STOP IT! IT'S ALREADY DEAD!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: H-hold on! I'll send an ambulance over right now! I need some extra emergency workers! The bustle location is--

dialogue.speaker: INTERNAL VOICE
dialogue.line: You dummy. You're not even used to your power yet. If you suddenly use so much blood, you're gonna pass out.

summary: The protagonist struggles against a powerful bug monster, unable to use his weapon or full power. An internal voice encourages him to embrace his power, leading him to manifest a weapon from his own blood and defeat the monster, though he risks passing out from the exertion.
